def positive_read_and_write_paths_share_mutable_internal_cache_without_boundary():
    rule_id = "read_and_write_paths_share_mutable_internal_cache_without_boundary"
    family = "structure"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag read and write paths that couple through one mutable cache object."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
